tasks.description: Perform in-depth risk and structural analysis on current portfolio.

subtasks.description: Evaluate pairwise correlations using calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix with portfolio_dict.
Identify top risk contributors and weaknesses via analytics (VaR, drawdown, exposure, stress_test tools), always including portfolio_dict.

tasks.description: Optimize portfolio: Remove weaknesses, retain strengths, and find replacements.

subtasks.description: Decide tickers to remove, retain, or size-adjust based on analytic findings.
For every two tickers dropped, use stock_screener to identify strong, diversified replacements (including ETFs); repeat at least three times with focused constraints.

tasks.description: Define, document, and run analytics on the new/optimized portfolio.

subtasks.description: Document the new/optimized portfolio and update episodic memory with details.
Run analytics: calculate portfolio performance, risk, concentration, factor tilts, and stress resilience. All tools must use the updated portfolio_dict.

tasks.description: Iteratively refine the new portfolio to maximize risk-adjusted return and meet user constraints.

subtasks.description: Identify areas for incremental improvement (reducing correlation, enhancing alpha, lowering beta).
Test small, evidence-based adjustments with analytic tools until portfolio is well-optimized against objectives.

tasks.description: Output the optimized portfolio and summarize portfolio changes in strict JSON format per instructions.

subtasks.description: Format and output the optimized portfolio and detailed change log in required JSON schema.
